title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Blue Star India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Blue Star India
jsonLd.description:
We at Blue Star India are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Navi Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Blue Star India:
Blue Star India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Star India!
